---
title: "Animint Gallery"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(animint2)
---

Animint Gallery

This gallery contains animint visualizations.


👉 Do NOT overcomplicate  
👉 `update_gallery()` will fill everything

---

# 💻 STEP 3 — Clone repo locally (REQUIRED)

```bash
git clone https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/animint-gallery.git
cd animint-gallery
git checkout gh-pages
